title: Archaeology Imposters
description:
Making Archaeology a little more sus.

It adds a few tweaks to make it easier to point out suspicious sand while digging around in Minecraft’s new Archeology
body: # Archaeology Imposters This Resource Pack aims to make Minecraft Archaeology a little easier (and more sus) by adding and among us character to the suspicious sand and gravel blocks making them easier to pick out especially in the underwater ruins. In addition I made this pack a bit more sus and hid more easter eggs. ## Features - Adds a much cooler title screen in a desert temple with the new textures being showcased, - Renames sniffer egg to imposter as well as making it shaped like and AmongUs man, - Renames and retextures the brush to the String Pickaxe as a reference to the early archaeology snapshots, - Plops and AmongUs character in the sus stew, - And of course makes the sus sand/gravel have and AmongUs man on the sides making it easier to point out.
